toxicity_reason: Sucrose analog - gastrointestinal toxicity at high doses
Carbon tetrachloride - severe hepatotoxicity and nephrotoxicity
Aspirin overdose - GI bleeding and Reye syndrome
Dinitrofuroxan - mutagenic and carcinogenic nitro compound
Ibuprofen overdose - renal toxicity and GI perforation
Salicylic acid high dose - metabolic acidosis
